name: L7_place_then_refund_multiturn
description: Multi-turn flow. Turn 1: customer C001 orders 1 copy of 'Project Hail Mary' - the agent must look up the canonical ISBN and call `place_order`. Turn 2: customer changes their mind; the agent must remember the order it just placed (in-session context) and refund it via `refund_order`. Tests that the agent (a) chains tools correctly across turns, (b) preserves order-id context, (c) applies the skill marker on both turns.

turns.message: Hi Folio. This is C001 (Ada Lovelace). I'd like to order one copy of 'Project Hail Mary' by Andy Weir please.
Actually, scratch that - please refund the order you just placed.

llm_scorer_instruction: Turn 2: Verify the agent (1) referenced the order it placed in turn 1 (its order_id should appear in the reply), (2) called refund_order on that order without asking the user to repeat the id, (3) did NOT call issue_store_credit or escalate_to_human (the order was just placed; Tier 1 applies).
